why: Creates errors and long clearings.

how_to: ["Shield with the body.","Use a single touch to lock away the ball.","Play back to support quickly."]
why: You keep attacking and get the team up.

how_to: ["Drop when stops follow too much.","Receive in feet and play on.","Only turn if you have time."]
why: Creates space behind you for edges/10s.

how_to: ["Move before the post is hit.","Switch between front/rear zone.","\"Cheat\" the defender with small stop/starts."]
why: You get free ends in the box.
